prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年延边大学在天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为14918、14513、14969、14219、14616名，整体在14200-15000名区间波动，近5年无明显单向升降趋势 ，2025年基准位次约14616名；该校在天津市招生计划2021-2025年均为28人，2026年（招生计划文件）大幅扩招至48人，增幅达71.4%，为近年来最大规模扩招 ，将显著缓解竞争压力，使录取位次明显后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉:
延边大学为国家211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名近年持续上升，从2021年第198名升至2026年第15 7名，学校综合实力稳步提升，对考生吸引力有所增强；该校近年无明显声誉舆情事件，抖音热度排名第79位（评价"一般"），短视频平台曝光度中等偏低；无 投档断档或暴跌记录，报考心理预期平稳，未出现异常波动信号；第五轮学科评估中延。
6. 【专业热度与环境】该校在津招生专业中，计算机类、电子信息类、临床医学等为高热推荐专业，土木工程、机械类为劝退专业。天津市2026年高考报名总人数约82000人，较202 5年71938人增加约14%，考生规模扩大将加剧整体竞争，部分抵消扩招效应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 延边大学位于吉林省延边朝鲜族自治州，距天津较远，东北高校对天津考生吸引力 一般，无明显地域偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年招生计划大幅扩招71.4%（竞争显著缓解）、天津市考生总数增加约14%（竞争加剧）、学校排名持续上升（吸引力增强 ）等因素，扩招效应远大于考生增幅，预计2026年录取位次将较2025年明显后移。预测最低录取位次约20681名，区间20181-21181名。

- 通信工程。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年延边大学在天津大幅扩招至48人，录取位次预计明显后移至约20681名。位次在预测区间20181-21181内的考生，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业适度冲刺、三档专 业稳妥保底。位次优于区间下限（20181名以内）的考生可重点冲刺计算机科学与技术、临床医学等热门专业；位次在区间中后段的考生建议优先考虑二档专业，同时将三档专业 作为保底选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Yanbian University in Tianjin's comprehensive category were 14918, 14513, 14969, 14219, and 14616 respectively, fluctuating within the range of 14200-15000, with no significant one-way trend in the past 5 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 14616. The university's enrollment plan in Tianjin was 28 students each year from 2021 to 2025, but in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document), it significantly expanded to 48 students, an increase of 71.4%, the largest expansion in recent years, which will significantly alleviate competition pressure and cause the admission ranking to shift noticeably backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yanbian University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been rising steadily, from 198th in 2021 to 157th in 2026, indicating a steady improvement in overall strength, which enhances its appeal to candidates. In recent years, there have been no significant reputation incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 79th (rated as 'average'), indicating moderate to low exposure on short video platforms. There are no records of filing gaps or sharp drops, and the psychological expectations for applications are stable, with no abnormal fluctuation signals. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Yanbian...

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among the majors offered by the university in Tianjin, computer science, electronic information, and clinical medicine are highly recommended popular majors, while civil engineering and mechanical engineering are discouraged majors. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Tianjin college entrance examination is approximately 82,000, an increase of about 14% compared to 71,938 in 2025. The expansion of the candidate pool will intensify overall competition, partially offsetting the expansion effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant 71.4% expansion in the 2026 enrollment plan (competition significantly alleviated), the approximately 14% increase in the number of candidates in Tianjin (competition intensified), and the continuous rise in the university's ranking (increased appeal), the expansion effect far outweighs the candidate increase. It is expected that the admission ranking in 2026 will shift noticeably backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 20681, with a range of 20181-21181.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Artificial Intelligence
- Clinical Medicine
- Electronic Information Engineering
- Communication Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Chinese Language and Literature (Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese Language, Chinese International Education)
- Economics (Economics, International Economics and Trade)
- Anesthesiology
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Civil Engineering
- Pharmacy (Pharmacy, Pharmaceutical Preparations)
- Nursing
- Physics (including Teacher Training and Non-Teacher Training)
- Chemistry (Chemistry, Applied Chemistry)
- Supply Chain Management.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Yanbian University significantly expanded its enrollment in Tianjin to 48 students, and the admission ranking is expected to shift noticeably backward to approximately 20681. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 20181-21181 are advised to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, moderately aim for Tier 1 majors, and safely secure Tier 3 majors as backups. Candidates with rankings better than the lower limit of the range (within 20181) can focus on aiming for popular majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Clinical Medicine. Candidates in the middle to back of the range are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors while using Tier 3 majors as safe choices.
